{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Candle Bay Playhouse
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Candle Bay Playhouse]] performs [[Heart Like a Churning Sea]] every summer.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
